items.title: S01E01 - Royal Flush
items.summary: The Monkees rescue Princess Bettina, Duchess of Harmonica (Katherine Walsh) from her evil uncle Archduke Otto (Theodore Marcuse).

infolabels.title: Royal Flush
infolabels.plot: The Monkees rescue Princess Bettina, Duchess of Harmonica (Katherine Walsh) from her evil uncle Archduke Otto (Theodore Marcuse).

items.title: S01E02 - Monkee See, Monkee Die
items.summary: The Monkees spend the night in a haunted house to collect an inheritance.

infolabels.title: Monkee See, Monkee Die
infolabels.plot: The Monkees spend the night in a haunted house to collect an inheritance.

items.title: S01E03 - Monkee vs. Machine
items.summary: In a computerized toy factory, the Monkees foil an efficiency expert (Stan Freberg) who wants to replace an old toymaker (Walter Janovitz) with automation.

infolabels.title: Monkee vs. Machine
infolabels.plot: In a computerized toy factory, the Monkees foil an efficiency expert (Stan Freberg) who wants to replace an old toymaker (Walter Janovitz) with automation.

items.title: S01E04 - Your Friendly Neighborhood Kidnappers
items.summary: A shady PR man (Andre Philippe) kidnaps the Monkees to prevent them from winning a talent contest in order for his clients (rival band the Four Swines) to win.

infolabels.title: Your Friendly Neighborhood Kidnappers
infolabels.plot: A shady PR man (Andre Philippe) kidnaps the Monkees to prevent them from winning a talent contest in order for his clients (rival band the Four Swines) to win.

items.title: S01E05 - The Spy Who Came in from the Cool
items.summary: The Monkees get mixed up in a spy ring (Jacques Aubuchon, Arlene Martel) after Davy accidentally purchases a set of red maracas containing secret microfilm. Can the Monkees outwit two professional spies ?

infolabels.title: The Spy Who Came in from the Cool
infolabels.plot: The Monkees get mixed up in a spy ring (Jacques Aubuchon, Arlene Martel) after Davy accidentally purchases a set of red maracas containing secret microfilm. Can the Monkees outwit two professional spies ?

items.title: S01E06 - Success Story
items.summary: Davy's grandfather (Ben Wright) visits, and the Monkees try to convince him that his grandson is wealthy and successful.

infolabels.title: Success Story
infolabels.plot: Davy's grandfather (Ben Wright) visits, and the Monkees try to convince him that his grandson is wealthy and successful.

items.title: S01E07 - Monkees in a Ghost Town
items.summary: Stranded in a ghost town after their car runs out of gas, the Monkees are held prisoner by bank robbers (Len Lesser, Lon Chaney Jr.) and their boss, "The Big Man" (Rose Marie).

infolabels.title: Monkees in a Ghost Town
infolabels.plot: Stranded in a ghost town after their car runs out of gas, the Monkees are held prisoner by bank robbers (Len Lesser, Lon Chaney Jr.) and their boss, "The Big Man" (Rose Marie).

items.title: S01E08 - Don't Look a Gift Horse in the Mouth
items.summary: Davy is given a horse, which the Monkees have to hide from their landlord, Mr. Babbitt (Henry Corden). It is returned to a heart-broken child (Kerry MacLane) and father (Jim Boles) after Davy rides it to victory over the horse of the father's neighbor. Famed character actor, and frequent Bob Hope sideman, Jerry Colonna plays veterinarian Doctor Mann.

infolabels.title: Don't Look a Gift Horse in the Mouth
infolabels.plot: Davy is given a horse, which the Monkees have to hide from their landlord, Mr. Babbitt (Henry Corden). It is returned to a heart-broken child (Kerry MacLane) and father (Jim Boles) after Davy rides it to victory over the horse of the father's neighbor. Famed character actor, and frequent Bob Hope sideman, Jerry Colonna plays veterinarian Doctor Mann.

items.title: S01E09 - The Chaperone
items.summary: Davy's feelings for retired General Harley Vandenberg's (Arch Johnson) daughter Leslie (Sherry Alberoni) leads Micky to pose as a female chaperone at a party after the real chaperone (Diana Chesney) gets drunk.

infolabels.title: The Chaperone
infolabels.plot: Davy's feelings for retired General Harley Vandenberg's (Arch Johnson) daughter Leslie (Sherry Alberoni) leads Micky to pose as a female chaperone at a party after the real chaperone (Diana Chesney) gets drunk.

items.title: S01E10 - Here Come the Monkees - The Pilot
items.summary: The Monkees play a sweet sixteen party and help the birthday girl (Robyn Millan) with her studies after she falls for Davy.

infolabels.title: Here Come the Monkees - The Pilot
infolabels.plot: The Monkees play a sweet sixteen party and help the birthday girl (Robyn Millan) with her studies after she falls for Davy.

items.title: S01E11 - Monkees à la Carte
items.summary: The Monkees pose as the Purple Flower Gang to save their favourite Italian restaurant from a gangster (Harvey Lembeck).

infolabels.title: Monkees à la Carte
infolabels.plot: The Monkees pose as the Purple Flower Gang to save their favourite Italian restaurant from a gangster (Harvey Lembeck).

items.title: S01E12 - I've Got a Little Song Here
items.summary: Mike is fleeced by a fraudulent music publisher (Phil Leeds), but Micky dons the guise of a flashy Hollywood producer to get Mike's money back.

infolabels.title: I've Got a Little Song Here
infolabels.plot: Mike is fleeced by a fraudulent music publisher (Phil Leeds), but Micky dons the guise of a flashy Hollywood producer to get Mike's money back.

items.title: S01E13 - One Man Shy (Peter and the Debutante)
items.summary: Bashful Peter tries to win the heart of lovely debutante Valerie Cartwright (Lisa James) while dealing with her haughty boyfriend Ronnie Farnsworth (George Furth).

infolabels.title: One Man Shy (Peter and the Debutante)
infolabels.plot: Bashful Peter tries to win the heart of lovely debutante Valerie Cartwright (Lisa James) while dealing with her haughty boyfriend Ronnie Farnsworth (George Furth).

items.title: S01E14 - Dance, Monkee, Dance
items.summary: The Monkees sign up for lessons at Renaldo's Dance Au Go Go (Hal March), and then find out that their contracts are for life.

infolabels.title: Dance, Monkee, Dance
infolabels.plot: The Monkees sign up for lessons at Renaldo's Dance Au Go Go (Hal March), and then find out that their contracts are for life.

items.title: S01E15 - Too Many Girls (Davy and Fern)
items.summary: A domineering stage mother tries to use Davy to further her daughter Fern's career.

infolabels.title: Too Many Girls (Davy and Fern)
infolabels.plot: A domineering stage mother tries to use Davy to further her daughter Fern's career.

items.title: S01E16 - Son of a Gypsy
items.summary: A band of gypsies, headed by the powerful Maria (Jeanne Arnold), force the Monkees to steal a priceless statuette called the "Maltese Vulture."

infolabels.title: Son of a Gypsy
infolabels.plot: A band of gypsies, headed by the powerful Maria (Jeanne Arnold), force the Monkees to steal a priceless statuette called the "Maltese Vulture."

items.title: S01E17 - The Case of the Missing Monkee
items.summary: Peter becomes involved with the disappearance of the respected Professor Milo Schnitzler (Norbert Schiller) and then disappears himself.

infolabels.title: The Case of the Missing Monkee
infolabels.plot: Peter becomes involved with the disappearance of the respected Professor Milo Schnitzler (Norbert Schiller) and then disappears himself.

items.title: S01E18 - I Was a Teenage Monster
items.summary: A mad scientist (John Hoyt) hires the Monkees to teach his monster (Richard Kiel) music—and then transplants their musical talent into the monster. Can the Monkees get their talent back? Byron Foulger appears as Groot, Dr. Mendoza's assistant.

infolabels.title: I Was a Teenage Monster
infolabels.plot: A mad scientist (John Hoyt) hires the Monkees to teach his monster (Richard Kiel) music—and then transplants their musical talent into the monster. Can the Monkees get their talent back? Byron Foulger appears as Groot, Dr. Mendoza's assistant.

items.title: S01E19 - The Audition (Find the Monkees)
items.summary: When television producer Hubbell Bensen (Carl Ballantine) hears a tape of the Monkees, he frantically stages auditions in the hope of finding them for his new television show, unaware they are desperately trying to audition for him.

infolabels.title: The Audition (Find the Monkees)
infolabels.plot: When television producer Hubbell Bensen (Carl Ballantine) hears a tape of the Monkees, he frantically stages auditions in the hope of finding them for his new television show, unaware they are desperately trying to audition for him.

items.title: S01E20 - Monkees in the Ring
items.summary: A crooked fight promoter (Ned Glass) prepares to cash in on a big bet by making Davy a stooge in a bout with the champ.

infolabels.title: Monkees in the Ring
infolabels.plot: A crooked fight promoter (Ned Glass) prepares to cash in on a big bet by making Davy a stooge in a bout with the champ.

items.title: S01E21 - The Prince and the Paupers
items.summary: Davy doubles for a lookalike Peruvian prince in order to win the heart of Wendy Forsythe (Heather North) or forfeit his throne to evil Count Myron (Oscar Beregi Jr.).

infolabels.title: The Prince and the Paupers
infolabels.plot: Davy doubles for a lookalike Peruvian prince in order to win the heart of Wendy Forsythe (Heather North) or forfeit his throne to evil Count Myron (Oscar Beregi Jr.).

items.title: S01E22 - Monkees at the Circus
items.summary: To save a bankrupt circus, the Monkees pose as a troupe of dazzling, supreme high-wire artists from France known as the Mozzarelli Brothers, but get in trouble when their guise requires them to actually perform.

infolabels.title: Monkees at the Circus
infolabels.plot: To save a bankrupt circus, the Monkees pose as a troupe of dazzling, supreme high-wire artists from France known as the Mozzarelli Brothers, but get in trouble when their guise requires them to actually perform.

items.title: S01E23 - Captain Crocodile
items.summary: The Monkees' appearance on popular children's show The Captain Crocodile Show is sabotaged by its host (Joey Forman), who fears that his guest's popularity is diminishing his own.

infolabels.title: Captain Crocodile
infolabels.plot: The Monkees' appearance on popular children's show The Captain Crocodile Show is sabotaged by its host (Joey Forman), who fears that his guest's popularity is diminishing his own.

items.title: S01E24 - Monkees à la Mode
items.summary: The Monkees are chosen as "Typical Young Americans of the Year," by Chic magazine, a haughty publication that runs a bogus article on the group moulding them into a false image of clean cut young men.

infolabels.title: Monkees à la Mode
infolabels.plot: The Monkees are chosen as "Typical Young Americans of the Year," by Chic magazine, a haughty publication that runs a bogus article on the group moulding them into a false image of clean cut young men.

items.title: S01E25 - Alias Micky Dolenz
items.summary: The police cash in on Micky's striking resemblance to imprisoned crime kingpin Baby Face Morales in an attempt to locate robbery loot.

infolabels.title: Alias Micky Dolenz
infolabels.plot: The police cash in on Micky's striking resemblance to imprisoned crime kingpin Baby Face Morales in an attempt to locate robbery loot.

items.title: S01E26 - Monkee Chow Mein
items.summary: Peter finds a secret message in a fortune cookie at a Chinese restaurant, forcing Monkeemen Davy and Mike to come to his rescue from the evil Dragonman (Joey Forman).

infolabels.title: Monkee Chow Mein
infolabels.plot: Peter finds a secret message in a fortune cookie at a Chinese restaurant, forcing Monkeemen Davy and Mike to come to his rescue from the evil Dragonman (Joey Forman).

items.title: S01E27 - Monkee Mother
items.summary: Middle-aged widow Millie (Rose Marie) moves in with the Monkees as a new tenant, resulting in the boys' trying to find her a husband.

infolabels.title: Monkee Mother
infolabels.plot: Middle-aged widow Millie (Rose Marie) moves in with the Monkees as a new tenant, resulting in the boys' trying to find her a husband.

items.title: S01E28 - Monkees on the Line
items.summary: Hired by a telephone answering service, the Monkees are soon plunged into mix-ups, hang-ups and crossed wires leading to pursuit by a crooked bettor (Milton Frome).

infolabels.title: Monkees on the Line
infolabels.plot: Hired by a telephone answering service, the Monkees are soon plunged into mix-ups, hang-ups and crossed wires leading to pursuit by a crooked bettor (Milton Frome).

items.title: S01E29 - Monkees Get Out More Dirt
items.summary: The Monkees' friendship is threatened when they all fall for the same girl, luscious local laundromat proprietress April Conquest (Julie Newmar).

infolabels.title: Monkees Get Out More Dirt
infolabels.plot: The Monkees' friendship is threatened when they all fall for the same girl, luscious local laundromat proprietress April Conquest (Julie Newmar).

items.title: S01E30 - Monkees in Manhattan
items.summary: In New York City, the Monkees fend off an irate hotel manager (Philip Ober) as they help a producer (Richard Anders) get backing for a Broadway musical.

infolabels.title: Monkees in Manhattan
infolabels.plot: In New York City, the Monkees fend off an irate hotel manager (Philip Ober) as they help a producer (Richard Anders) get backing for a Broadway musical.

items.title: S01E31 - Monkees at the Movies
items.summary: The Monkees have a run-in with a snobbish movie idol (Bobby Sherman) on the set as extras in a beach movie.

infolabels.title: Monkees at the Movies
infolabels.plot: The Monkees have a run-in with a snobbish movie idol (Bobby Sherman) on the set as extras in a beach movie.

items.title: S01E32 - Monkees on Tour
items.summary: A mini-documentary chronicling a live Monkees concert gig on location in Phoenix, Arizona during their first public appearance tour.

infolabels.title: Monkees on Tour
infolabels.plot: A mini-documentary chronicling a live Monkees concert gig on location in Phoenix, Arizona during their first public appearance tour.

items.title: S02E01 - It's a Nice Place to Visit
items.summary: In El Monotono, Mexico, Davy is captured by a bandito (Peter Whitney) and his minions for being "captivated" with El Diablo's girlfriend (Cynthia Hull).

infolabels.title: It's a Nice Place to Visit
infolabels.plot: In El Monotono, Mexico, Davy is captured by a bandito (Peter Whitney) and his minions for being "captivated" with El Diablo's girlfriend (Cynthia Hull).

items.title: S02E02 - The Picture Frame
items.summary: Peter must prove the Monkees' innocence when they unwittingly rob a bank in the pretext of making a movie for two con men (Cliff Norton, Kelton Garwood).

infolabels.title: The Picture Frame
infolabels.plot: Peter must prove the Monkees' innocence when they unwittingly rob a bank in the pretext of making a movie for two con men (Cliff Norton, Kelton Garwood).

items.title: S02E03 - Everywhere a Sheik, Sheik
items.summary: It is a "harem-scare 'em" scene as Davy faces the prospect of marriage to a lovely Nehudian princess (Donna Loren).

infolabels.title: Everywhere a Sheik, Sheik
infolabels.plot: It is a "harem-scare 'em" scene as Davy faces the prospect of marriage to a lovely Nehudian princess (Donna Loren).

items.title: S02E04 - Monkee Mayor
items.summary: Mike casts his wool hat into the ring to stop a crooked construction tycoon (Monte Landis) from turning the city into parking lots.

infolabels.title: Monkee Mayor
infolabels.plot: Mike casts his wool hat into the ring to stop a crooked construction tycoon (Monte Landis) from turning the city into parking lots.

items.title: S02E05 - Art, for Monkees' Sake
items.summary: At an art museum, Peter copies an old painting for two guards (Monte Landis, Vic Tayback) who are actually thieves bent on snatching the real painting.

infolabels.title: Art, for Monkees' Sake
infolabels.plot: At an art museum, Peter copies an old painting for two guards (Monte Landis, Vic Tayback) who are actually thieves bent on snatching the real painting.

items.title: S02E06 - I Was a 99 lb. Weakling
items.summary: After losing his girlfriend Brenda to a muscle man named Bulk, Micky starts a health program under the guidance of fraudulent physical cultist Shah-Ku (Monte Landis).

infolabels.title: I Was a 99 lb. Weakling
infolabels.plot: After losing his girlfriend Brenda to a muscle man named Bulk, Micky starts a health program under the guidance of fraudulent physical cultist Shah-Ku (Monte Landis).

items.title: S02E07 - Hillbilly Honeymoon
items.summary: Lost in Swineville, the Monkees get caught in the middle of a hillbilly feud between the Weskitts and Chubbers with Davy staring down the barrel of a shotgun wedding to pretty Ella Mae Chubber (Melody Patterson).

infolabels.title: Hillbilly Honeymoon
infolabels.plot: Lost in Swineville, the Monkees get caught in the middle of a hillbilly feud between the Weskitts and Chubbers with Davy staring down the barrel of a shotgun wedding to pretty Ella Mae Chubber (Melody Patterson).

items.title: S02E08 - Monkees Marooned
items.summary: Peter trades his guitar for a con man’s treasure map. On a deserted island, the Monkees go hunting for treasure—and are hunted by a mad Australian (Monte Landis) and his man Thursday (Rupert Crosse).

infolabels.title: Monkees Marooned
infolabels.plot: Peter trades his guitar for a con man’s treasure map. On a deserted island, the Monkees go hunting for treasure—and are hunted by a mad Australian (Monte Landis) and his man Thursday (Rupert Crosse).

items.title: S02E09 - Card Carrying Red Shoes
items.summary: Peter is the target of a romantic prima ballerina (Ondine Vaughn) and a dastardly plot choreographed by the rest of the ballet company.

infolabels.title: Card Carrying Red Shoes
infolabels.plot: Peter is the target of a romantic prima ballerina (Ondine Vaughn) and a dastardly plot choreographed by the rest of the ballet company.

items.title: S02E10 - The Wild Monkees
items.summary: The Monkees turn chicken when they unwittingly befriend the girlfriends of a tough motorcycle gang.

infolabels.title: The Wild Monkees
infolabels.plot: The Monkees turn chicken when they unwittingly befriend the girlfriends of a tough motorcycle gang.

items.title: S02E11 - A Coffin Too Frequent
items.summary: A mad scientist (George Furth), his goony cousin (Mickey Morton), and his dotty aunt (Ruth Buzzi) use the Monkees' pad for a séance to summon their relative Elmer from beyond.

infolabels.title: A Coffin Too Frequent
infolabels.plot: A mad scientist (George Furth), his goony cousin (Mickey Morton), and his dotty aunt (Ruth Buzzi) use the Monkees' pad for a séance to summon their relative Elmer from beyond.

items.title: S02E12 - Hitting the High Seas
items.summary: Thoughts of mutiny are bountiful as the Monkees try to stop the hijack of a cargo ship by a vengeful sea captain (Chips Rafferty).

infolabels.title: Hitting the High Seas
infolabels.plot: Thoughts of mutiny are bountiful as the Monkees try to stop the hijack of a cargo ship by a vengeful sea captain (Chips Rafferty).

items.title: S02E13 - Monkees in Texas
items.summary: In the Lone Star State, the Monkees outwit Black Bart (Barton MacLane), his cohort Red (Len Lesser) and the gang to save Mike's Aunt Kate's (Jacqueline deWit) ranch.

infolabels.title: Monkees in Texas
infolabels.plot: In the Lone Star State, the Monkees outwit Black Bart (Barton MacLane), his cohort Red (Len Lesser) and the gang to save Mike's Aunt Kate's (Jacqueline deWit) ranch.

items.title: S02E14 - Monkees on the Wheel
items.summary: In Las Vegas, the Monkees are mistaken for crooked gamblers by a roulette dealer (Rip Taylor) and policeman (Dort Clark) and try their luck at exposing the real gang (David Astor and Pepper Davis).

infolabels.title: Monkees on the Wheel
infolabels.plot: In Las Vegas, the Monkees are mistaken for crooked gamblers by a roulette dealer (Rip Taylor) and policeman (Dort Clark) and try their luck at exposing the real gang (David Astor and Pepper Davis).

items.title: S02E15 - The Christmas Show
items.summary: The Monkees try to instil the spirit of Christmas in a cynical little boy (Butch Patrick) who has soured on the whole idea.

infolabels.title: The Christmas Show
infolabels.plot: The Monkees try to instil the spirit of Christmas in a cynical little boy (Butch Patrick) who has soured on the whole idea.

items.title: S02E16 - Fairy Tale
items.summary: A Monkee pantomime romp through Fairy Tale Land, introduced by a "Town Crier" (Rege Cordic), sees Peter rescuing a haughty princess (Michael) from death by her fiendish fiancee (Murray Roman).

infolabels.title: Fairy Tale
infolabels.plot: A Monkee pantomime romp through Fairy Tale Land, introduced by a "Town Crier" (Rege Cordic), sees Peter rescuing a haughty princess (Michael) from death by her fiendish fiancee (Murray Roman).

items.title: S02E17 - Monkees Watch Their Feet
items.summary: A documented film report by the Department of UFO Information, headed by Pat Paulsen, shows the Monkees foiling an invasion by aliens (Stuart Margolin and Nita Talbot) from Planet Zlotnick.

infolabels.title: Monkees Watch Their Feet
infolabels.plot: A documented film report by the Department of UFO Information, headed by Pat Paulsen, shows the Monkees foiling an invasion by aliens (Stuart Margolin and Nita Talbot) from Planet Zlotnick.

items.title: S02E18 - Monstrous Monkee Mash
items.summary: The Monkees attempt to rescue Davy from his girlfriend Lorelei (Arlene Martel), Count Batula (Ron Masak), a wolf man (David Pearl), mummy man, and a Frankenstein-looking monster in a creepy castle.

infolabels.title: Monstrous Monkee Mash
infolabels.plot: The Monkees attempt to rescue Davy from his girlfriend Lorelei (Arlene Martel), Count Batula (Ron Masak), a wolf man (David Pearl), mummy man, and a Frankenstein-looking monster in a creepy castle.

items.title: S02E19 - The Monkees' Paw
items.summary: A broken-down magician's (Hans Conried) magical monkey's paw starts to bring the equally broken Monkees luck... unfortunately, all bad.

infolabels.title: The Monkees' Paw
infolabels.plot: A broken-down magician's (Hans Conried) magical monkey's paw starts to bring the equally broken Monkees luck... unfortunately, all bad.

items.title: S02E20 - The Devil and Peter Tork
items.summary: At an eerie pawn shop, Peter unwittingly sells his soul to devilish character Mr. Zero (Monte Landis) in order to purchase a golden harp! Can Peter's musical talent save him from Mr. Zero's evil clutches forever ?

infolabels.title: The Devil and Peter Tork
infolabels.plot: At an eerie pawn shop, Peter unwittingly sells his soul to devilish character Mr. Zero (Monte Landis) in order to purchase a golden harp! Can Peter's musical talent save him from Mr. Zero's evil clutches forever ?

items.title: S02E21 - Monkees Race Again
items.summary: Davy drives the Monkeemobile in an auto race when the British entry is sabotaged by Baron Von Klutz (David Hurst) and his Klutzmobile. Featuring a cameo appearance by co-producer Bob Rafelson as the "World's Oldest Flower Child."

infolabels.title: Monkees Race Again
infolabels.plot: Davy drives the Monkeemobile in an auto race when the British entry is sabotaged by Baron Von Klutz (David Hurst) and his Klutzmobile. Featuring a cameo appearance by co-producer Bob Rafelson as the "World's Oldest Flower Child."

items.title: S02E22 - The Monkees in Paris
items.summary: The Monkees take a vacation from the studio grind and are chased (on location) all over the French Capital by beautiful girls and gendarme.

infolabels.title: The Monkees in Paris
infolabels.plot: The Monkees take a vacation from the studio grind and are chased (on location) all over the French Capital by beautiful girls and gendarme.

items.title: S02E23 - Monkees Mind Their Manor
items.summary: Davy inherits an English manor but must first win a tournament against Sir Twiggley Toppen Middle Bottom (Bernard Fox) with lances, swords and vocal cords.

infolabels.title: Monkees Mind Their Manor
infolabels.plot: Davy inherits an English manor but must first win a tournament against Sir Twiggley Toppen Middle Bottom (Bernard Fox) with lances, swords and vocal cords.

items.title: S02E24 - Some Like It Lukewarm
items.summary: To enter and win a band contest hosted by radio DJ Jerry Blavat, David poses as a girl and falls in love with Daphne (Deana Martin), posing as a boy for her group who is also in the contest.

infolabels.title: Some Like It Lukewarm
infolabels.plot: To enter and win a band contest hosted by radio DJ Jerry Blavat, David poses as a girl and falls in love with Daphne (Deana Martin), posing as a boy for her group who is also in the contest.

items.title: S02E25 - Monkees Blow Their Minds
items.summary: The Monkees swing to the rescue when mentalist Oracullo (Monte Landis) gains control of Peter's mind to use him in a nightclub act. Director James Frawley appears as Oracullo's assistant Rudy.

infolabels.title: Monkees Blow Their Minds
infolabels.plot: The Monkees swing to the rescue when mentalist Oracullo (Monte Landis) gains control of Peter's mind to use him in a nightclub act. Director James Frawley appears as Oracullo's assistant Rudy.

items.title: S02E26 - Mijacogeo - The Frodis Caper
items.summary: The Monkees match wits with the insane Wizard Glick (Rip Taylor), who is out to control the minds of television viewers worldwide.

infolabels.title: Mijacogeo - The Frodis Caper
infolabels.plot: The Monkees match wits with the insane Wizard Glick (Rip Taylor), who is out to control the minds of television viewers worldwide.
